previous_checkpoint.summary: TASK-092 was the latest completed checkpoint.

changes_since_last_checkpoint.summary: TASK-092 completed: Ship v7.3 Governed Multi-Actor Pilot

Define the v7.4 Governed Parallel Lanes slice: split a bounded work item into parallel lanes, require lane-local evidence, record join/conflict semantics, and close only through Council-approved merge or stop decision.
